column1: C[ExNihilo: Hello. Have a nice game
FredABlog: oh... finally found the chat box... Hi!
FredABlog: and black and white are the Western way round.... confusing
FredABlog: I've played, why does ""submit move"" keep flashig and my clock is ticking?
C[FredABlog: oh... finally found the chat box... Hi!
FredABlog: and black and white are the Western way round.... confusing
FredABlog: I've played, why does ""submit move"" keep flashig and my clock is ticking?
C[FredABlog: so we have to click twice to make a move?
C[ExNihilo: I guess so. I'm actually pretty new here.
C[ExNihilo: I suppose it's only the case for correspondence games
C[ExNihilo: But since the server is almost empty, correspondence games seem to be the best options to find an opponent.
C[FredABlog: I lose track wth such games
C[FredABlog: used to play postcard go
C[ExNihilo: Seeing how I just missclicked on T11, I'm starting to like this move confirming thing
C[FredABlog: what were you doing hovering at T11?
C[ExNihilo: No bad thoughts, I assure you.
C[ExNihilo: Oh well, I'm going far too fancy in the endgame/
C[FredABlog: you can never be too fancy in the endgame.....
C[ExNihilo: Unless you're fancily giving away dozens of points.
FredABlog: got greedy, but i needed to
FredABlog: oh well........ new interface and all.....
